# Sogn Contracting LLC

> Licensed general contractor in Bandon, Oregon. 30 years of residential and commercial construction on the Southern Oregon Coast. Custom homes, renovations, additions, and construction management from permits to final walkthrough.

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.sogncontracting.com/): who Sogn Contracting is and what they build
- [Services](https://www.sogncontracting.com/services/): general contracting, custom homes, renovations, additions
- [Gallery](https://www.sogncontracting.com/gallery/): before and after project photos
- [Contact](https://www.sogncontracting.com/contact/): free estimates and contact details

## Facts
- Service area: Bandon and the Southern Oregon Coast
- Licensed general contractor, residential and commercial work
- 30 years of construction experience

Website by Winters Code (https://winterscode.com), Bandon, Oregon.
